Class OpenAiCompatibleModelMessage

java.lang.Object
uno.anahata.asi.agi.event.BasicPropertyChangeSource
uno.anahata.asi.agi.message.AbstractMessage
uno.anahata.asi.agi.message.AbstractModelMessage<OpenAiCompatibleResponse>
uno.anahata.asi.openai.compatible.OpenAiCompatibleModelMessage
All Implemented Interfaces:
PropertyChangeSource, Rebindable
Direct Known Subclasses:
OpenAiCompatibleMessage
public abstract class OpenAiCompatibleModelMessage extends AbstractModelMessage<OpenAiCompatibleResponse>
Base implementation for OpenAI-specific model messages. Provides common logic for content accumulation, finish reason mapping, and tool call handling across different OpenAI API versions.
Author:
anahata

  • Field Details

    • insideReasoningTags

      private boolean insideReasoningTags
      State flag indicating if the parser is currently inside a reasoning tag.

  • Constructor Details

    • OpenAiCompatibleModelMessage

      public OpenAiCompatibleModelMessage(Agi agi, String modelId)
      Constructs a new base model message.
      Parameters:
      agi - The parent session.
      modelId - The model ID.

  • Method Details

    • updateFromNode

      public abstract void updateFromNode(com.fasterxml.jackson.databind.JsonNode node, OpenAiCompatibleReasoningStyle reasoningStyle, String reasoningFieldName, List<String> reasoningTags)
      Updates the message content and state from a JSON node (choice, item, or event).
      Parameters:
      node - The JSON node to parse.
      reasoningStyle - The strategy for extracting thoughts.
      reasoningFieldName - The field name for reasoning content (if using FIELD style).
      reasoningTags - The tags for reasoning content (if using TAGS style).

    • updateToolCall

      public abstract void updateToolCall(com.fasterxml.jackson.databind.JsonNode callNode)
      Updates a single tool call from a JSON node.
      Parameters:
      callNode - The JSON node containing the tool call (or delta).

    • flushToolCalls

      public abstract void flushToolCalls()
      Flushes any buffered tool calls (used during streaming). This ensures that partial tool call arguments are fully assembled and registered in the tool manager.

    • setFinishReasonFromOpenAi

      public void setFinishReasonFromOpenAi(String fr)
      Sets the finish reason from a raw OpenAI string.
      Parameters:
      fr - The raw finish reason string (e.g., "stop", "length").

    • mapFinishReason

      private FinishReason mapFinishReason(String reason)
      Maps a standard OpenAI finish reason string to the Anahata enum.
      Parameters:
      reason - The raw string from the API.
      Returns:
      The corresponding FinishReason.

    • appendContent

      public void appendContent(String text)
      Appends text to the main content part or creates a new one.
      Parameters:
      text - The text to append.

    • appendThoughts

      public void appendThoughts(String text)
      Appends text to the reasoning/thought part or creates a new one.
      Parameters:
      text - The thought text to append.

    • appendTaggedContent

      public void appendTaggedContent(String text, String startTag, String endTag)
      Appends text while detecting and extracting reasoning content wrapped in tags.
      Parameters:
      text - The text containing potential tags.
      startTag - The opening tag (e.g., <think>).
      endTag - The closing tag (e.g., </think>).
